description: The chatMutation.onError callback checks isUnauthorizedError and redirects to /api/login, but does NOT wrap the toast() call or window.location.href assignment in try/catch. If toast context is unavailable, this will throw. Wrap in try/catch.
successCriteria: chatMutation.onError wraps all logic in try/catch
Logs error to console if toast or redirect fails
Component does not crash on error handling failure
